listings.name: Love's Travel Stop #429
listings.description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop at the Trinity Lane (US-431) interchange in north Nashville, on the I-65/I-24 concurrency where I-65 exit numbers are retained (I-65 northbound exit 87B). Formerly Pilot Travel Center #292; rebranded to Love's #429 (same site/phone). Diesel, showers, Subway, convenience store, CAT Scale on site, and a Love's Truck Care tire/service center (listed separately). Reported truck parking count varies by source (49 vs 65), left blank pending confirmation.
listings.corroboration: Official Love's location page + truckstopsandservices + Yelp + TruckMap all confirm 130 W Trinity Ln, Nashville 37207, phone 615-226-6393, Love's #429. AARoads confirms the Trinity Lane interchange is on the I-65/I-24 concurrency and RETAINS I-65 exit numbering (exit 87); iExit lists it as I-65 Exit 87 (US-431/Trinity Ln), ~0.25 mi from exit 87B. Yelp shows the same address was previously Pilot #292 (rebrand, not a second facility).

listings.name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #429, Nashville
listings.description: CAT Scale certified truck scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #429 at the Trinity Lane (US-431) interchange, I-65 exit 87 in north Nashville (I-65/I-24 concurrency, I-65 numbering retained).
listings.corroboration: CAT Scale locator returns a CAT Scale at the I-24/I-65 Exit 87 / 130 W Trinity Ln, Nashville location (phone 615-226-6393). Love's official page and truckstopsandservices amenity list both confirm CAT Scale on site.

listings.name: Love's Truck Care - Love's Travel Stop #429
listings.description: Love's Truck Care center co-located at Love's Travel Stop #429, Trinity Lane (I-65 exit 87), Nashville. Four truck service bays offering commercial truck tire sales/service (verified Bridgestone/Firestone commercial tire dealer at this address), 24-hour emergency road service, and light mechanical/oil service.
listings.corroboration: Firestone Commercial and Bridgestone Commercial dealer locators both list a Love's Travel Stop commercial truck tire dealer at exactly 130 W Trinity Ln, Nashville. Love's page and truckstopsandservices confirm 4 truck service bays, tire repair, and road service at the site.

excluded.name: Pilot Travel Center #292 (Trinity Lane)
excluded.reason: Same site as 130 W Trinity Ln, now rebranded/operating as Love's Travel Stop #429 (identical address and phone 615-226-6393). Not a distinct facility; would duplicate the Love's listing.

excluded.name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Nashville
excluded.reason: Conflicting source data on location and corridor: Waze lists 611 Much Dr, Nashville 37207; but Yelp/businessyab/truckerpath list the operating site as 611 Muci Dr, Antioch 37013 served by I-24 Exit 62, and other directory entries cite I-65 Exit 86/95. I-65-vs-I-24 identity and exit could not be independently confirmed; the operating facility appears to be on I-24 (Antioch), so excluded from the I-65 segment. Also a 'Blue Beacon of Nashville opening soon' PDF exists, suggesting relocation. Recommend a dedicated I-24 pass verify it.

excluded.name: Pilot Travel Center #413
excluded.reason: 6418 Centennial Blvd (TN-155/Briley Pkwy exit 26, I-40 west side, NOT I-65). Yelp lists it as CLOSED (updated 2026). Excluded: permanently closed and not on I-65.

excluded.name: TravelCenters of America - Nashville (111 N 1st St)
excluded.reason: Downtown TA ('Candy Store' / #034) permanently closed per Landline Media report. Excluded (closed).

excluded.name: TA Franklin (Peytonsville Rd)
excluded.reason: I-65 Exit 61, ~13 miles south of this segment (exits 74-90). Belongs to a southern I-65 segment, not seg4.

excluded.name: TGC Auto & Truck Repair
excluded.reason: 321 E Trinity Ln, 37207 (near I-65 exit 87) but a small Mon-Sat auto/truck repair shop; heavy-truck (semi) access and category-fit not independently confirmed. Held out pending verification.

excluded.name: Tennessee weigh / scale stations on I-65
excluded.reason: No THP commercial-vehicle scale house exists on I-65 within exits 74-90. Nearest I-65 scales are MM 55 (Giles County, near Ardmore, south) and MM 119 (Robertson County, near Portland, north) — both far outside this Davidson County segment.
